𝗪𝗘𝗕-𝗧𝗢-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | To allow users to easily convert any website or web project into a fully functional, installable Android application directly from their mobile device.  📈 Growing!

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🤖 Kotlin 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To allow users to easily convert any website or web project into a fully functional, installable Android application directly from their mobile device.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ On-device APK building for websites and local runtimes
✅ Supports various input types: URL, project folder, media library
✅ Customizable WebView, toolbar, splash screen, permissions, and signing
✅ Extensible with JS/CSS modules and userscripts
✅ Supports multiple runtime environments including Node.js, PHP, Python, Go, and WordPress
✅ Preview, build, sign, install, share, export, and back up generated apps


┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 651 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 2 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

WebToApp is an on-device Android application that transforms websites, HTML projects, and various local runtimes into standalone Android APKs. It offers a comprehensive suite of tools for building, customizing, and managing these apps directly on your phone without relying on remote services.

┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉┉

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/shiaho777/web-to-app

📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-powered remote server management via Model Context Protocol (MCP)
✅ Support for Claude Code and OpenAI Codex
✅ Execute commands on remote SSH servers
✅ File transfer capabilities
✅ Database management operations
✅ Automated backups
✅ Server health monitoring
✅ DevOps task automation
✅ Configuration hot-reloading
✅ Dead-code detection and removal in CI

MCP SSH Manager is a Node.js server that allows AI models like Claude Code and OpenAI Codex to manage remote SSH servers. It provides a framework for AI to execute commands, transfer files, manage databases, perform backups, and monitor server health, enabling sophisticated DevOps automation.

❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂❂

𝗙𝗔𝗦𝗧𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗢 | Accelerated video generation and real-time inference for diffusion models.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Accelerated video generation and real-time inference for diffusion models.
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ End-to-end post-training support for bidirectional and autoregressive models
✅ Data preprocessing pipeline for video, image, and text data
✅ Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD2) stepwise distillation
✅ Sparse attention with Video Sparse Attention
✅ Sparse distillation for >50x denoising speedup
✅ Scalable training with FSDP2, sequence parallelism, and selective activation checkpointing
✅ Causal distillation through Self-Forcing
✅ Sequence Parallelism for distributed inference
✅ Multiple state-of-the-art attention backends
✅ User-friendly CLI and Python API
✅ Diverse hardware and OS support (H100, A100, 4090, Linux, Windows, MacOS)
✅ Realtime video generation & editing with Dreamverse

FastVideo is a unified framework for accelerating video generation through post-training techniques and optimized inference. It supports various training methods like finetuning and distillation, and offers significant performance improvements for real-time video generation and editing.

𝗧𝗪𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗬 | Enabling technical teams to build and customize their own CRM solutions using code, offering an open-source and extensible alternative to traditional CRM platforms.  📈 Growing!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling technical teams to build and customize their own CRM solutions using code, offering an open-source and extensible alternative to traditional CRM platforms.
📅 Created: Dec 2022 • Updated: Jun 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Open-source CRM alternative
✅ AI-native design
✅ Customizable via code (objects, fields, views)
✅ Extensible with apps, agents, and logic functions
✅ Monorepo architecture
✅ TypeScript/React/NestJS stack
✅ Cloud, self-hosted, and local development options
✅ CLI for app scaffolding and publishing

Twenty is an open-source, AI-native CRM platform built with TypeScript, designed to be customizable and extensible. It allows technical teams to define CRM objects, fields, and views as code, enabling them to build and version their CRM like any other part of their software stack.
